name: personality
description: Multi-CLI persistent personalities: definitions, per-machine state, lock, transcript replay, and the `personality` verb (issue #14, spec docs/research/multi_cli_personality_skill_spec.md).

consider.reason: Skill body for the personality role; primary ownership stays with the skills Facet (ADR-0004).
Spec contract for the personality skill; primary ownership stays with the root Facet (docs/research/**).

commands.name: personality
commands.purpose: Multi-CLI personality verb (#14). Subcommands list (roster + last_active), init (scaffold definition), as-root (interactive persistent session via native resume or fresh seed), ask (one-shot non-interactive; native resume preferred, transcript replay fallback), and clear (wipe `.local/personalities/<name>/`; definition preserved). Definitions at `.agents/personalities/<name>/personality.md`, defaults at `.agents/personalities/_defaults.yaml`.
